text:
# Constituencies

## Assembly Constituency list under West Tripura District Sub Division Wise

### Sadar

1. 4- Barjala (SC)
2. 6- Agartala
3. 7- Ramnagar
4. 8-Town Bardowali
5. 9- Banamalipur
6. 13-Pratapgarh(SC)
7. 14-Badharghat(SC)
8. 18-Suryamaninagar

### Mohanpur

1. 1-Simna(ST)
2. 2-Mohanpur
3. 3-Bamutia(SC)

### Jirania

1. 5-Khayerpur
2. 10-Majlishpur
3. 11-Mandai Bazar(ST)

### Loksabha Constituency Name

1-Tripura West Parliamentary Constituency
